title: Public perception and market reaction following the 2019 Tesla Cybertruck reveal event

polling_trajectory.source: Estimated: Recovery trend based on social media sentiment analysis following initial shock
Estimated: Normalization of brand perception as novelty settles
Estimated: Continued positive momentum from pre-order volume reports
Estimated: Incremental growth in pro-side sentiment
Estimated: Final convergence toward long-term brand affinity

events.description: Official Cybertruck reveal event featuring broken window demo
Elon Musk tweets about 200,000 pre-orders, boosting confidence
Tesla stock price surge increases public interest and perceived viability

agents.name: Wall Street Analysts

notes: Pro-side is defined as individuals expressing positive sentiment, purchase intent, or admiration for the Cybertruck design/innovation. Against-side is defined as individuals expressing negative sentiment, mockery of the design, or skepticism regarding the vehicle's utility. Data quality note: Only the first round is based on a verified survey; subsequent rounds are estimates based on trend extrapolation and market sentiment indicators.
